title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
